attr.title: Ex Vitro
attr.desc: EX VITRO is a dark sci-fi 2D platformer where you delve into the ruins of a military research facility and discover the horrors within. Whether machine, creature, or something else entirely, you’ll face the violent legacy of the last survivors of humanity.
attr.inst: Download the game from Steam and copy all game files into the assets folder. At minimum, a H700 device is required, RK3566 and above recommended.
attr.inst_md: Download the game from [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2425580/Ex_Vitro/) and copy all game files into the `assets` folder. At minimum, a H700 device is required, RK3566 and above recommended.
